message:
fix(runtime): change RaptorQ placeholder scrub status from "ok" to "placeholder"

Newly constructed placeholder RaptorQ envelopes were reporting scrub
status as "ok", which is misleading since no actual scrub has occurred.
Changed to "placeholder" to accurately reflect that this is a sentinel
value awaiting real scrub execution. Updated the corresponding unit test
assertion to match.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
